description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: test, benchmark, and deploy, and a global before_script that links any installed pypy binaries to /usr/local/bin/python. In the test stage define docs, lint, py34-test, py35-test, py36-test, py37-test, and pypy3-test jobs, each using the appropriate Docker image (python:3.6 for docs and lint, python:3.4/3.5/3.6/3.7 for the versioned tests, pypy:3 for pypy3-test), all tagged with docker, each running "pip install tox" then "tox", with a TOXENV variable set to docs, lint, py34-test, etc., and the docs job also produces an artifact of the built HTML at docs/_build/html. In the benchmark stage define py34-benchmark, py35-benchmark, py36-benchmark, py37-benchmark, and pypy3-benchmark jobs, each using the matching Docker image, tagged docker, running the script sequence "apt-get -qq update", "apt-get -y -qq install graphviz inxi > /dev/null", "inxi -c0 -v3", "pip install tox", "tox", with TOXENV set to the corresponding benchmark name, and each uploading the .benchmarks and prof directories as artifacts. In the deploy stage add a pages job that depends on the docs job, runs "mv docs/_build/html public", publishes the public directory as an artifact, and is restricted to run only on tag refs matching the regular expression /^v[0-9]+.*/. No services or caches are defined, and all jobs inherit the global before_script.
